endpoints.docs: Tests the core BigCommerce pattern: userPost -> userBase -> userStrict. The grandparent's properties must be resolved through the nested $ref.
endpoints.name: createUser

properties.docs: Whether to send a welcome email
properties.name: acceptWelcomeEmail

endpoints.docs: Tests that sibling properties at the parent level (companyBase has its own properties in addition to $ref) are all preserved.
endpoints.name: createCompany
endpoints.displayName: Create a company (sibling properties alongside nested $ref)

endpoints.docs: Tests that when a parent's allOf contains multiple $ref entries, all of them are resolved and their properties merged.
endpoints.name: createPlant
endpoints.displayName: Create a plant (multiple $ref in single allOf)
